feed.title: Public key recovery for EC leaves in P2MR (BIP-360)

entry.title: Public key recovery for EC leaves in P2MR (BIP-360)
entry.summary: The email reveals an appreciative reception of a recently introduced idea, which appears to have potential applications beyond its initial intent. The sender expresses enthusiasm about how the concept or methodology could address what they refer to as "the laggards problem." Although this issue is mentioned in passing, it suggests a broader relevance and possible future discussions surrounding this newly recognized challenge. The positive feedback underscores the innovative nature of the solution presented and hints at collaborative or further explorative efforts to tackle other problems using similar approaches.
